_intent: ALWAYS TEACH — words that the cognate detector would flag as transparent but which must stay learnable. Use for false friends (real≠royal, largo≠large, éxito≠exit, embarazada≠embarrassed, sopa≠soap, carpeta≠carpet), basic words that share an English spelling but mean something different (no, si), and high-frequency items English speakers get wrong in Spanish. Voters skipped: identical_gloss, suffix_rule, cognet, curated.
_note: This list OVERRIDES the cognate skip. A word in always_teach.json will stay in the deck even if every cognate voter fires.
